CREATE TABLE agents (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    url TEXT NOT NULL,
    type TEXT DEFAULT 'lm_studio',
    model TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown',
    latency_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    last_check TEXT,
    gpu_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    vram_gb INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)
CREATE TABLE sqlite_sequence(name,seq)

CREATE TABLE skills_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    skill_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    trigger_text TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'success',
    duration_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    agent_used TEXT,
    error TEXT,
    executed_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

CREATE TABLE sessions (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    mode TEXT DEFAULT 'keyboard',
    started_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    ended_at TEXT,
    commands_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    skills_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    agents_called INTEGER DEFAULT 0
)

CREATE TABLE memories (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL,
    value TEXT NOT NULL,
    source TEXT DEFAULT 'jarvis',
    confidence REAL DEFAULT 1.0,
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    UNIQUE(category, key)
)

CREATE TABLE metrics (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    agent TEXT NOT NULL,
    metric_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    value REAL NOT NULL,
    unit TEXT DEFAULT 'ms',
    recorded_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

CREATE TABLE api_keys (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    service TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    key_name TEXT,
    key_value TEXT NOT NULL,
    endpoint TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
    added_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

CREATE TABLE map (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    entity_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    entity_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    parent TEXT,
    ip TEXT,
    port INTEGER,
    model TEXT,
    role TEXT,
    gpu_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    vram_gb INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    api_key TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
    depends_on TEXT,
    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}',
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    UNIQUE(entity_type, entity_name)
)

CREATE TABLE benchmark_runs (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    duration_ms INTEGER,
    total_levels INTEGER,
    total_nodes INTEGER,
    best_node TEXT,
    best_score REAL,
    worst_node TEXT,
    worst_score REAL,
    notes TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE benchmark_results (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    run_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    level INTEGER NOT NULL,
    level_category TEXT,
    node TEXT NOT NULL,
    model TEXT,
    status TEXT,
    latency_ms INTEGER,
    output_len INTEGER,
    score INTEGER,
    keyword_hits TEXT,
    quality TEXT,
    FOREIGN KEY (run_id) REFERENCES benchmark_runs(id)
)

CREATE TABLE consensus_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    query TEXT NOT NULL,
    nodes_queried TEXT,
    nodes_responded TEXT,
    verdict TEXT,
    confidence REAL,
    details TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE jarvis_queries (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    node TEXT NOT NULL,
    domain TEXT NOT NULL,
    prompt TEXT,
    latency_ms INTEGER NOT NULL,
    success INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    routing_source TEXT DEFAULT 'static',
    response_preview TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE cluster_health (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
    node TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    model TEXT,
    latency_ms INTEGER
)

CREATE TABLE agent_keywords (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        agent TEXT NOT NULL,
        keyword TEXT NOT NULL,
        domain TEXT NOT NULL,
        weight REAL DEFAULT 1.0,
        scenario TEXT DEFAULT 'default',
        hit_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
        UNIQUE(agent, keyword, scenario)
    )

CREATE TABLE pipeline_dictionary (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        pipeline_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
        trigger_phrase TEXT NOT NULL,
        steps TEXT,
        category TEXT NOT NULL,
        action_type TEXT,
        agents_involved TEXT,
        avg_duration_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
    )

CREATE TABLE scenario_weights (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        scenario TEXT NOT NULL,
        agent TEXT NOT NULL,
        weight REAL DEFAULT 1.0,
        priority INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
        chain_next TEXT,
        description TEXT,
        UNIQUE(scenario, agent)
    )

CREATE TABLE domino_chains (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        trigger_cmd TEXT NOT NULL,
        condition TEXT DEFAULT 'always',
        next_cmd TEXT NOT NULL,
        delay_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        auto INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
        description TEXT,
        UNIQUE(trigger_cmd, condition, next_cmd)
    )

CREATE TABLE voice_corrections (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    wrong TEXT NOT NULL,
    correct TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT DEFAULT 'phonetic',
    hit_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0
)

CREATE TABLE pipeline_tests (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    test_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    pipeline_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL,
    latency_ms INTEGER,
    details TEXT,
    cluster_node TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE domino_logs (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            run_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            domino_id TEXT NOT NULL,
            step_name TEXT NOT NULL,
            step_idx INTEGER NOT NULL,
            status TEXT NOT NULL,
            duration_ms REAL,
            node TEXT,
            output_preview TEXT,
            error TEXT,
            ts TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
        )
CREATE TABLE sqlite_stat1(tbl,idx,stat)

CREATE TABLE user_patterns (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    action TEXT NOT NULL,
    hour INTEGER NOT NULL,
    weekday INTEGER NOT NULL,
    context TEXT,
    timestamp REAL NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE lm_studio_config (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT, runtime TEXT, gpu_count INTEGER,
    models_total INTEGER, models_loaded INTEGER,
    config_json TEXT, gpu_info TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE session_progress (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),
    session_type TEXT,
    description TEXT,
    details TEXT,
    metrics TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE cluster_snapshots (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),
    nodes TEXT,
    routing TEXT,
    test_results TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE project_milestones (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),
    milestone TEXT,
    category TEXT,
    status TEXT,
    details TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE boot_log (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                ts TEXT, duration_s REAL, phases TEXT, report TEXT)

CREATE TABLE cluster_bench (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                run_id TEXT, ts TEXT, scenario TEXT, node TEXT,
                ok INTEGER, latency_s REAL, tokens INTEGER, tok_s REAL,
                quality REAL, score REAL, rank INTEGER,
                content TEXT, error TEXT)

CREATE TABLE stress_pipeline (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                run_id TEXT, ts TEXT, phase TEXT, node TEXT,
                ok INTEGER, lat REAL, toks INTEGER, toks_s REAL,
                category TEXT, routed_to TEXT)

CREATE TABLE agent_patterns (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts TEXT,
    pattern_name TEXT UNIQUE,
    agent_primary TEXT,
    agent_secondary TEXT,
    category TEXT,
    avg_latency_s REAL,
    avg_toks_s REAL,
    fiabilite_pct REAL,
    description TEXT,
    routing_rule TEXT,
    benchmark_run TEXT
)

CREATE TABLE mega_bench (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    run_id TEXT, ts TEXT, batch TEXT, task_id INTEGER,
    circuit TEXT, format TEXT, size_class TEXT,
    node TEXT, ok INTEGER, lat REAL, toks INTEGER, toks_s REAL,
    prompt_preview TEXT, content_preview TEXT, error TEXT)

CREATE TABLE mega_summaries (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, run_id TEXT, ts TEXT, total_ok INTEGER, total_fail INTEGER,
    duration REAL, m1_score REAL, m2_score REAL, m3_score REAL, ol14_score REAL, notes TEXT)

CREATE TABLE integration_tests (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ts TEXT, test_name TEXT, result TEXT, notes TEXT)

CREATE TABLE mega_bench_v2 (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    run_id TEXT, ts TEXT, batch TEXT, task_id INTEGER,
    circuit TEXT, format TEXT, size_class TEXT, category TEXT,
    node TEXT, ok INTEGER, lat REAL, toks INTEGER, toks_s REAL,
    prompt_preview TEXT, content_preview TEXT, error TEXT)

CREATE TABLE agent_dispatch_log (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
        request_text TEXT,
        classified_type TEXT,
        agent_id TEXT,
        model_used TEXT,
        node TEXT,
        strategy TEXT DEFAULT 'single',
        latency_ms INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        tokens_in INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        tokens_out INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        success INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
        error_msg TEXT,
        quality_score REAL DEFAULT 0
    )

CREATE TABLE cowork_script_mapping (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    script_name TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    pattern_id TEXT,
    script_path TEXT,
    description TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'active',
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

CREATE TABLE agent_episodic_memory (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    pattern TEXT, node TEXT, prompt_hash TEXT, prompt_preview TEXT,
                    success INTEGER, quality REAL, latency_ms REAL, strategy TEXT,
                    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                )

CREATE TABLE cluster_night_work (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp TEXT, node TEXT,
        category TEXT, prompt TEXT, response TEXT, elapsed_s REAL, error TEXT)

CREATE TABLE cluster_pipeline_cycles (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, cycle_id TEXT, timestamp TEXT,
        tasks_total INTEGER, tasks_ok INTEGER, nodes_used TEXT,
        avg_latency_s REAL, total_tokens_est INTEGER, duration_s REAL)

CREATE TABLE cluster_pipeline_log (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, cycle_id TEXT, timestamp TEXT,
        node TEXT, category TEXT, prompt TEXT, response TEXT, elapsed_s REAL,
        error TEXT, tokens_est INTEGER, quality_score REAL)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_content (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, timestamp TEXT, idea TEXT,
        topic TEXT, tone TEXT, theme TEXT, post_fr TEXT, post_en TEXT,
        comments_json TEXT, hashtags TEXT, agents_used TEXT,
        generation_time_s REAL, status TEXT)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_schedule (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, created_at TEXT, scheduled_at TEXT,
        post_text TEXT, post_lang TEXT, topic TEXT, status TEXT,
        published_at TEXT, method TEXT, agent_used TEXT, generation_time_ms INTEGER)

CREATE TABLE linkedin_interactions (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),
        interaction_type TEXT NOT NULL,
        source_text TEXT,
        generated_reply TEXT,
        agent_used TEXT,
        status TEXT DEFAULT 'draft',
        posted_at TEXT,
        generation_time_ms INTEGER
    )

CREATE TABLE linkedin_feed_items (
        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
        collected_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now','localtime')),
        author TEXT,
        preview TEXT,
        engagement_hint TEXT,
        used_for_inspiration INTEGER DEFAULT 0
    )

CREATE TABLE tool_metrics (
                        id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                        ts REAL NOT NULL,
                        tool_name TEXT NOT NULL,
                        caller TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
                        success INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                        latency_ms REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                        error TEXT,
                        http_status INTEGER
                    )

CREATE TABLE openclaw_routing (
                            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                            ts REAL NOT NULL,
                            agent TEXT NOT NULL,
                            intent TEXT NOT NULL,
                            confidence REAL NOT NULL,
                            fallback INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                            latency_ms REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                            source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fast'
                        )

CREATE TABLE cowork_execution_log (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    script TEXT, args TEXT, exit_code INTEGER,
                    duration_ms REAL, success INTEGER,
                    stdout_preview TEXT, stderr_preview TEXT,
                    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                )

CREATE TABLE quality_gate_log (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    pattern TEXT, passed INTEGER,
                    overall_score REAL, failed_gates TEXT,
                    node TEXT, timestamp TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                )

CREATE TABLE agent_semantic_facts (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    fact_type TEXT, subject TEXT, predicate TEXT, value TEXT,
                    confidence REAL, source TEXT,
                    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                    UNIQUE(fact_type, subject, predicate)
                )

CREATE TABLE prompt_optimization_log (
                    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                    pattern TEXT, original_length INTEGER,
                    optimized_length INTEGER, quality_before REAL,
                    quality_after REAL, optimization_type TEXT,
                    timestamp TEXT DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                )

CREATE TABLE config_snapshots (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts REAL NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL,
    value TEXT NOT NULL,
    source TEXT DEFAULT 'auto'
)

CREATE TABLE jarvis_system_config (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts REAL NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    value TEXT NOT NULL
)
